title: mRemoteNG Download links broken
author: xsilvertom
body_snippet:
Hi,

Web on mremoteng.org and download icon points to `https://mremoteng.org/downloads` (note the "s"), but shows no content (when triggered from web). Not even older versions. And shows HTTP/404 when opened directly or when cURL is used.

Git in `**[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed** ..  points in Download section to two places.
- `Project Website https://mremoteng.org/download)` .. (note "s" is missing here), and goes straight to HTTP/404 File Not Found
- `**[CE

iterations.description: Already implemented in current code: the context menu exposes "Connect (with options) -> Connect without credentials", and connection matching differentiates sessions by username/domain so a no-credentials launch does not collapse into an existing credentialed session.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Thanks, will try to fix it, curently NB versio is the latest but its not production ready, keep trying to fix all main issues before promoting to release.

notes: Website issue (download links on mremoteng.org), not a code bug. Out of scope for this fork.
